title: Mostly Optimized (NEOFORGE)
description: An Optimization and quality of life Modpack with lots of features. Supports 1.21.8 (1.21.9 support coming soon!)
body:
# Triple your FPS with Mostly Optimized NEOFORGE!
## Here's what it does:

Mostly Optimized attempts to make minecraft be less laggy, have higher FPS, reduce lag spikes, load chunks faster, create worlds faster, and replacate every feature from Optifine. Some of those features are shaders, zooming, dynamic lighting, removing fog, fullbright, custom entity models, custom capes, higher render distance, better grass, randomized textures, Configurable animations and details, connected textures, and more, so if a resource pack or a mod says it requires Optifine to work you can get it working in Mostly Optimized! I also included some mods I personaly use but I tryed not to change to many vanilla mechanics, and if you don't like a certain feature in this modpack feel free to add or disable any mod/resource/data/shader pack you want to have the experience you want! . Thank you to [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop), [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), and [Vanilla Perfected](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-perfected) for the inspiration!
# Downloading Vanilla Tweaks

### What is Vanilla Tweaks?
Vanilla Tweaks is a resource and data pack that lets you choose the changes you want to make to your game, most of these features are quality of life and bug fixes, there are a variety of changes to be made to your game like makes ores have borders and much more.

### How To Download Vanilla Tweaks!
Vanilla Tweaks is not in Mostly Optmized by default because its's not on modrinth To Download Vanilla Tweaks Visit the site [vanillatweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
and pick the changes you want to be made! Alternatively you can use the mod VTdownloader To Download The a Vanilla Tweaks Resource Pack Directly ingame, just press the Download VT Resource Pack Button to download a pack and from there you can choose the changes you want to be made (VTDownloader is in Mostly Optmized by default). But It does not work with Data Packs just resource packs so I recommend you to just download it manully.
